{{Quote|Our academy classmate Tars Nandy. It was he who destroyed the ''Lark'', killing all those people.|[[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] to [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]]|<ref name="Empire 12">[[Empire 12|''Empire'' 12]]</ref>}}
The '''''Lark''''' was a private [[Transport/Legends|transport]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eedoq]] which was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial forces]] just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The ship had been on a mission to deliver students to the [[Clarion Scholars Academy]] on the planet [[Daemen]] when it was intercepted by the Imperial frigate [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']].

[[File:Lark_massacre.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The massacre seen from [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter's]] cockpit.]]

Unable to provide the proper Imperial identification codes, the ship was ordered to be boarded by the commanding officer of the ''Rand Ecliptic'' [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Heliesk]]. [[Twilight Squadron (Imperial)|Twilight Squadron]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] encircled the ship and its commander, [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], ordered to not destroy the ship. Unfortunately, an over eager [[TIE pilot]], [[Tars Nandy]], instead fired on the ship, destroying it and killing all onboard.

This incident, and the Empire's cold calous towards it, lead to the mutiny of [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] who then joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
